availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Krueger's comments + correct lin5=> ⲡϣⲁ*word-sep-apostrophe* (change lin3 to lin5 in Krueger's comment); lin4-5=> ⲁⲧⲉⲧⲛⲙⲛ̄5.- [ⲧⲉⲓⲱⲧ] <:κελεῦειν=grc|reg|[ⲕⲉⲗⲉ]ⲩⲉ:> (add reconstructions, but delete the question marks); lin7=> *middot* (instead of *dot*); lin10=> *middot* (instead of *dot*); lin10=> ⲁⲡⲁ ⲓ(¨)ⲱ (add diaresis); lin11=> <:[.?]ⲕ̣ⲥⲟⲟⲩⲛ=PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|[.?]ⲥⲟⲟⲩⲛ:>; lin12=> 12. [.?]ϣ ⲙⲟⲟϣⲉ .1 (correct [.?] to .1); lin13=> ⲁⲣⲓ .1(correct [.?] to .1); 15. [.?]ϣⲗ.2[.?] (correct vestig to .2); add a 16th line: <:16. [.?].2[.?]=PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|:>

Vote - AcceptText - Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.
Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.
lin3=> ⲡϣⲁ*word-sep-apostrophe* lin4=> 4.- [.?] ϫⲉ (add hyphen+space); ⲁⲧⲉⲧⲛⲙⲛ̄5.- [ⲧⲉⲓⲱⲧ(?)] <:κελεῦειν=grc|reg|[ⲕⲉⲗⲉ(?)]ⲩⲉ:> (add reconstructions) lin5=> ⲉⲧⲣⲉⲩⲣ̄ ϣⲁ (add stroke and space) lin6=> <:[.?].1ϩⲙ=Pn F. Krueger (photograph)|ed|[.?]ϩⲙ:> lin7=> [.?] ϣⲁ ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩ (add spaces) lin8=> 8.- [.?]ⲱⲣⲕ (add hyphen) lin10=> 10.- (add hyphen) lin11=> 11.- (add hyphen)

Submit - Added text according to O.Crum 91. Added diaeresis in lin7 and supralinear lines in lins4, 6 and 8. Please check that I got them right and for more possibly. Added *dot* in lins 7 and 10 from the image. Again check carefully please.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
vestiges
ϣⲁ ϣⲱ
ⲡϣⲁ ⲁⲁⲡⲁ ⲕⲟⲩ
ϫⲉ ⲁⲧⲉⲧⲛⲙⲛ
ⲧⲉⲓⲱⲧ κελεῦεινⲕⲉⲗⲉⲩⲉ ⲉⲧⲣⲉⲩⲣ ϣⲁ
ϩⲙϩⲙ ⲡⲉϥⲙⲁ ϫⲓⲛ
ϣⲁ ⲧⲉⲛⲟⲩ ⲁⲡⲁ ⲓⲱϩⲁⲛ
ⲱⲣⲕ ⲛⲏⲧⲛ ⲙⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ
ϫⲉ ⲧⲟⲩⲣⲏⲧⲉ ⲙⲡⲉⲙ
ⲛⲟⲩⲟⲉⲓϣ ⲁⲡⲁ ⲓⲱ
ⲕⲥⲟⲟⲩⲛⲥⲟⲟⲩⲛ ⲁⲩⲱ ⲛ
ϣ ⲙⲟⲟϣⲉ
ⲛϩⲏⲧ ⲁⲣⲓ
ⲁⲛ ⲛⲁⲓϣ
ϣⲗ
